display_title: Slay the Spire 2:War Historian, Repy
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 War Historian, Repy.png}} {{E|War Historian, Repy|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Glory}}. == Options == {{Frame|Unlock the Cage}} Lose {{C|Lantern Key|{{TS|gold||Lantern Key}}|2}}. Obtain {{R|History Course|{{TS|gold||History Course}}|2}}.
{{Frame|Unlock the Chest}} Lose {{C|Lantern Key|{{TS|gold||Lantern Key}}|2}}. Procure {{TS|blue||2}} random {{2|Potions|{{TS|gold||Potions}}}}. Obtain {{TS|blue||2}} random {{2|Relics|{{TS|gold||Relics}}}}. == Conditions == * Only appears if you have the {{C|Lantern Key||2}} via the {{E|The Lantern Key|2}}. == Dialogue ==
An academic is trapped in a {{TS|purple||hanging cage}} next to a {{TS|gold||treasure chest}}. The academic is muttering about {{TS|orange|up|"One-Time-Use Keys"}} while furiously writing something. Looks like you can unlock the {{TS|purple||cage}} or the {{TS|gold||chest}}.
{{Frame|Unlock the Cage}}
{{TS|green||Repy}} bows in appreciation as you open the cage. He hands you a {{TS|gold||thick leather tome}}. "Those who know not of history are doomed to repeat it. But you seem to know a thing or two about repeats don't you?"
{{Frame|Unlock the Chest}}
“Not going to free the scholar, {{TS|green||Repy}}? Based on classic philosophy, you would be considered a {{TS|red||moral failure}}. That's right, maybe consider the {{TS|purple||LIVING PERSON}} that is locked up next time! It is not as if there is a valuable member of society in a {{TS|purple||DIRE PREDICAMENT}} or anything!!” “Look, okay, see how small this cage is!? Why am I complaining? You've already made your unscholarly decision... oh, what's inside there? Some {{TS|gold||Potions}} and {{TS|gold||relics}}? Isn't that just great. Just great. Really great for you...” {{TS|green||Repy's}} eyes follow you with disdain as you walk away.
